LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS-DEFENDANT CHARLES SPRINCIN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN LARGE PART AND DENIED IN SMALL PART. ATTORNEY'S FEES ARE RECOVERABLE PER CORPORATIONS CODE 7237(D) AND SECTION 4.6 OF 140 SOUTH HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION BYLAWS. THE AMOUNT OF FEES AND COSTS SOUGHT FOR DEFENDING THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS REASONABLE. THE $10,000 IN FEES SOUGHT FOR THIS MOTION IS EXCESSIVE GIVEN THE RELATIVELY MODEST AMOUNT OF WORK NEEDED FOR THE MOTION. $3000 IS AWARDED FOR FEES FOR THIS MOTION. ACCORDINGLY, THE TOTAL AMOUNT AWARDED IS $86,418.04. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Mtn For Atty Fees
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TIM FLAHERTY OF MORRIS POLICH & PURDY LLP, TEL. NO. 984-8500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT CHARLES SPRINCIN'S Motion For Attorney Fees and Costs is Granted in large part and denied in small part. Attorney's fees are recoverable per Corporations Code 7237(d) and Section 4.6 of 140 South Homeowner's Association Bylaws. The amount of fees and costs sought for defending the cross-complaint is reasonable. The $10,000 in fees sought for this motion is excessive given the relatively modest amount of work needed for the motion. $3000 is awarded for fees for this motion. Accordingly, the total amount awarded is $86,418.04. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK/SM)
